name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug to help us improve StreamGuard
title: "[BUG] <short description of the problem>"
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
  Thank you for taking the time to file a bug report!
  Please fill out ALL sections below as completely as possible.
  Issues with insufficient information may be closed without action.
  
  ⚠️  SECURITY BUGS: Do NOT use this template. See SECURITY.md for the private disclosure process.
-->

## Bug Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

## Steps to Reproduce

<!-- Please provide a minimal, precise sequence of steps that consistently reproduces the issue. -->

1. Launch StreamGuard and go to '...'
2. Click / toggle '...'
3. Observe '...'

## Expected Behavior

<!-- What did you expect to happen? -->

## Actual Behavior

<!-- What actually happened? Include exact error messages, unexpected UI states, or incorrect outputs. -->

## Error Log

<!--
  The application writes detailed logs to:  %APPDATA%\StreamGuard\system.log
  Please paste the relevant portion below. Look for lines containing ERROR or WARNING near the time the bug occurred.
-->

<details>
<summary>Click to expand system.log output</summary>

```
Paste log content here
```

</details>

## Screenshots / Screen Recording

<!-- If the bug has a visible UI component, a screenshot or short recording greatly speeds up diagnosis. -->

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **StreamGuard Version** | <!-- e.g., v2.0.4 — visible in the app header top-right --> |
| **Operating System** | <!-- Windows 10 / Windows 11 (include build number if known) --> |
| **Installation Method** | <!-- Downloaded EXE installer / Running from source (python main.py) --> |
| **Python Version** *(if running from source)* | <!-- Run: python --version --> |

## Frequency

<!-- How often does this bug occur? -->
- [ ] Every time (100% reproducible)
- [ ] Intermittent (sometimes, sometimes not)
- [ ] Happened once — could not reproduce

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context that might help: Does it happen only on first launch? Only when going live on a specific YouTube account? After a specific bot action? -->
